title: Romeo and Juliet: A Love Song
original_title: Romeo and Juliet: A Love Song
overview: Shakespeare’s tale of teen love reimagined as a rock opera set in a beachside caravan park. A triumphant blast of style and 21st-century Kiwi trailer trash pop. Classic tragedy probably shouldn’t be quite this much fun.
